verdict: A well-synced and structurally sound chart with good flow, but contains overly complex hold patterns and a stretch jump that are inappropriate for an Easy difficulty.

issues.problem: A rapid succession of extremely short (eighth-note and quarter-note) holds is highly frustrating and mechanically complex for an Easy chart, often leading to accidental hold drops.
Another sequence of rapid, consecutive short holds that functions as a gimmick, which is too technical for beginner players.
Overlapping holds (HOLD L starting during HOLD D, followed by an immediate transition to HOLD U) require multi-tasking feet pressure that is too complex for an Easy difficulty level.
An Up-Down (UD) jump requires a sideways body orientation, which is generally discouraged in Easy-rated charts due to the physical reading strain on beginners.
